common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

hero.tagline: Your first session is free. No subscription. No commitment.
hero.subtext: Talk to someone who won't judge, won't forget what you said last time, and won't charge you $200 — an Ideal Self built from real psychology and tailored to your life.
hero.price: Free to start. $20 per session after.

entryPoints.label: Sound Familiar?
entryPoints.stuck: I'm stuck and I don't know why
entryPoints.stuckSub: Career paralysis, life transitions, feeling frozen
entryPoints.secret: I can't say this out loud to anyone
entryPoints.pattern: I keep making the same mistake
entryPoints.patternSub: Patterns you can see but can't stop
entryPoints.gap: I know what I should do but I can't do it
entryPoints.gapSub: The gap between intention and action

difference.label: The Difference
difference.body1: Chatbots validate you. Therapists analyze you. Neither of them will sit in front of you, look at the mess of your life, and tell you the thing you already know but haven't been able to say out loud.
difference.body2: This is a conversation with someone who sees the pattern you can't see from the inside.
difference.body3: You choose someone you admire — an archetype built from real psychology, real philosophy, and real lived experience. They don't tell you what to do. They help you see clearly enough to know for yourself.
difference.aiEndorsement: I am an AI. I should say that upfront. But I wasn't built to validate you, agree with you, or make you feel good. I was built from real psychology, real philosophy, and the actual details of your life — to say the thing no one else will say to your face. No other AI does that. Most people won't either.

system.label: The System
system.heading2: A daily operating system for your mind.
system.body: A single session can shift your perspective. But Earnest Page is built for those who want to go further — defining their highest standard and executing on it daily.
system.blueprintText: Define your highest standard — your Character Bible. The immutable baseline you answer to every day.
system.mirrorText: Consult your Ideal Self. Not a chatbot. Someone built from real psychology who challenges you to see clearly.
system.ledgerText: A silent, data-driven vault of your execution. When doubt sets in, the system proves you've won before.

architect.label: The Architect
architect.body1: I almost became a doctor. Instead, I became an engineer with a doctor's instinct — someone who builds technology but thinks about people first. I spent decades pressure-testing every major framework for the human mind, from CBT to Buddhist practice to McLean Hospital's most intensive program.
architect.body2: Earnest Page is not my first product. It may be my most important.
architect.founderLine: David Johnson · Founder · Patent Holder · 26 Years Building Systems That Work

privacy.heading: What you say stays here.
privacy.body: Your conversations are encrypted and private. Your identity is protected by a Contact Firewall and proximity shield. Nothing is sold. Nothing is shared.
privacy.subtext: Built by the maker of enterprise security systems — where privacy is the foundation, not the feature.

pricing.label: Get Started
pricing.freeDesc: One full conversation. No card required. No strings.
pricing.singleDesc: One full conversation. Up to 2 hours. No commitment.
pricing.threePackDesc: Three sessions. Use anytime. They remember where you left off.
pricing.giftDesc: For the person who needs this but would never seek it out themselves.
pricing.archangelSubLabel: For the Architect of Their Day
pricing.archangelDesc: All sessions included, every month. Up to 5 per day. No per-session fees, no counting credits. Auto-renews monthly. Cancel anytime.
pricing.freeNote: Your first session is on us. No card required.
pricing.refundNote: Not satisfied? Refund instantly. No forms, no emails, one click.

auth.heading2: No accounts. No emails. Just your phone.
auth.errorSendFailed: Failed to send code. Please try again.
auth.tryWhatsApp: Didn't receive it? Try WhatsApp instead
auth.byContinuing: By continuing, you agree to our

onboarding.processingSubtext: This takes a few minutes. Hang tight.
onboarding.errorDefault: Something went wrong. Please try again.

identityForm.visionTitle: Who Do You Want to Be?
identityForm.visionSub: Don't think about it too hard. Just write.
identityForm.ethnicityPlaceholder: e.g., Black, East Asian, Hispanic, Caucasian, Mixed...
identityForm.rantSub: Describe your ideal life — the person, the lifestyle, all of it. Raw is better than polished. We'll build your character from this.
identityForm.rantPlaceholder: I want to be the kind of man who wakes up with a plan. Financially free. A father my kids actually look up to. In the best shape of my life. Running something that matters...
identityForm.realitySub: Tell us about your life so your character fits your world.
identityForm.peopleSub: Who makes you feel something — good or bad? Family, friends, rivals, pets. Don't just list names — say what's real. We'll sort it out.
identityForm.peoplePlaceholder: My wife — we're solid but she thinks I work too much. My son (4) — my whole world. My dog Rex. My business partner — brilliant but I don't fully trust him yet...
identityForm.enjoymentsSub: What excites you? The things that make you happy stay — your character should love what you love.
identityForm.enjoymentsPlaceholder: Cooking for people, 90s hip-hop, horror movies, long drives with no plan, my morning coffee ritual, pickup basketball...

preChat.heading: One thing before we begin.
preChat.subtext: This helps us build someone who matches you.

intake.introSubtext: So the person you talk to actually knows your life. This takes about two minutes.
intake.compilingSub: This takes a few minutes. We're building something specific to you.
intake.readySub: We've built someone based on the person you described — your ideal self. This is your free first session. Speak openly.

vision.errorLogin: You must be logged in to publish.
vision.heading: What Do You Want?
vision.subtext: "The distance between where you are and what you want is determined by your frequency. Define the target. Generate the frequency."
vision.titlePlaceholder: e.g., A new car, $10k/month, a healthy relationship...
vision.descPlaceholder: Describe the details of what you want...

streamInput.placeholder: Type a feeling, thought, or action...

mirrorChat.promptOnboarding: Say hello — this is your free first session.
mirrorChat.directivesFailed: Failed to extract directives. Try again.
mirrorChat.burnMicrocopy: Zero retention. Erased immediately upon exit.
mirrorChat.sessionCompleteDesc: You've reached {max} exchanges. Extract your directives and close to start a new session.
mirrorChat.sessionExpiredDesc: Your {hours}-hour session window has ended. Extract your directives and close to start a new session.
mirrorChat.placeholderEnded: Session ended. Close to start a new one.

tollbooth.heading: Demand a Better Life.
tollbooth.body: Earnest Page is not another app you forget about. It is an intentional investment for someone who refuses to compromise. At $4 a day, securing your standard costs less than the coffee you drink while making excuses.
tollbooth.provingDesc: 30 days to prove you mean it. No extensions.
tollbooth.longDesc: You already proved it. Now build the compound effect.
tollbooth.selectPlan: Select your commitment above to proceed.

triagePanel.dailyLimit: Daily limit reached — go do the work.

feed.bibleCompilingSub: We're building someone specific to you from what you told us. This takes a few minutes — your session starts as soon as it's ready.
feed.bibleStaleSub: The build took longer than expected. Tap below to try again.
feed.bibleReadySub: Tap to view your Ideal Self →
feed.emptyFeed: No posts yet. Start a conversation to create your first post.
feed.firstSessionSub: Start a conversation with your Ideal Self — speak freely.
feed.commentSaved: Saved. Your character also left a note on another post ✨
feed.checkinContext: I am here for my 30 day check-in.

identityModal.title: Define Your Identity
identityModal.subtitle: Who are you? How do you want to show up in the world right now?
identityModal.errorUpdate: Failed to update. Please try again.

dossier.title: Dossier
dossier.empty: Your dossier will build over time as you use the app.

securityVault.title: Security & Routing
securityVault.proximityDesc: Posts within a 200-mile radius of your location are mathematically filtered from your feed. If browser GPS is disabled, anchor your radius manually.
securityVault.defaultRoutingDesc: Determine where your friction is logged by default.
securityVault.publicRoutingDesc: Anonymized friction routed to the network.
securityVault.privateRoutingDesc: Strict historical logging. No external visibility.
securityVault.dataDestructionDesc: Permanently and irrevocably delete your entire history of friction and tactical plans. We hold nothing back.
securityVault.burnWarning: This action is irreversible. All posts will be destroyed.
securityVault.accountDeletionDesc: Permanently delete your entire account, including all posts, conversations, character data, and authentication. This action is immediate and irreversible.
securityVault.deleteWarning: Type DELETE to confirm. All data will be destroyed.

contactFirewall.title: The Contact Firewall
contactFirewall.desc: Your execution requires total isolation. Block specific threats or upload your entire contact book to establish a permanent, cryptographic blind spot.
contactFirewall.trustDesc: We do not store your contacts. Everything is hashed locally on this device before it ever reaches our servers. You are mathematically invisible to your immediate orbit.
contactFirewall.precisionDesc: Enter the specific phone numbers of individuals whose presence would compromise your honesty on the platform.
contactFirewall.bulkDesc: Upload your device's raw contact export (.vcf or .csv). Hashing occurs entirely within your browser; the file never touches our servers.
contactFirewall.dragAndDrop: Drag and drop your contact file here
contactFirewall.skipForNow: Skip for now. I accept the risk of exposure.
contactFirewall.hashingDesc: SHA-256 · Client-side only · Zero transmission of raw data
contactFirewall.identitiesSecured: {count} identities secured. Your perimeter is locked.
contactFirewall.identitySecured: {count} identity secured. Your perimeter is locked.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Terms of Service for the Earnest Page platform.

s1.title: 1. Agreement to Terms
s1.p1: By accessing or using Earnest Page (“the Service”), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service (“Terms”). If you do not agree, do not use the Service. The Service is operated by Golden Black LLC (“we,” “us,” or “our”).

s2.title: 2. Eligibility
s2.p2: to use the Service. By creating an account, you represent and warrant that you meet this minimum age requirement. If you are under 18, you affirm that you have the consent of a parent or legal guardian.

s3.title: 3. Account & Authentication
s3.p1: Accounts are created via phone number verification. Your phone number is used solely for authentication and is never stored in our database. A cryptographic hash of your phone number is used for contact-exclusion features. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your device and account access.

s4.title: 4. Description of Service
s4.p1: Earnest Page is a self-actualization platform that provides:
s4.l1: An AI-powered conversational interface (“Mirror Chat”) that simulates dialogue with your defined Ideal Self
s4.l2: An AI-maintained personal dossier based on your conversations
s4.l3: Anonymous publishing of AI-synthesized posts to a social feed (“Dear Earnest”)
s4.l5: Character profile building and avatar generation

s5.title: 5. AI Processing & Content Generation
s5.p1: By using the Service, you acknowledge and consent to the following:
s5.l1: Your conversations with Mirror Chat are processed by third-party AI models (Anthropic Claude) to generate responses, action plans, and personal insights.
s5.l2: Conversations may be synthesized into anonymous, AI-ghostwritten posts that are published to the public feed. All personally identifiable information is removed before publication.
s5.l3: AI-generated content is not professional advice. The Service is not a substitute for therapy, counseling, medical care, or any professional service.

s6.title: 6. User Content & Conduct
s6.p1: You retain ownership of the content you provide (your identity information, conversations, and inputs). By using the Service, you grant us a limited license to process, anonymize, and publish derivative content as described in Section 5.
s6.p2: You agree not to use the Service in any manner described in our

s7.title: 7. Payment & Subscription
s7.p1: Access to the Service is available through individual session purchases or a recurring monthly subscription (The Archangel Program). Payments are processed securely through Stripe. By purchasing sessions or subscribing, you authorize the applicable charge.
s7.p1b: The Archangel Program is a recurring monthly subscription billed at $499/month. Your subscription will automatically renew each month until you cancel. You will be charged on the same date each month. By subscribing, you authorize recurring charges to your payment method.
s7.p2: You may cancel your subscription at any time from the Billing & Sessions page in your profile. If you cancel within 7 days of your initial subscription date, your payment will be refunded in full and access will end immediately. After 7 days, your cancellation takes effect at the end of your current billing period — you retain access until then, and no further charges will be made.
s7.p3: When your subscription period ends, you retain read-only access to your profile, dossier, and monthly reviews. The Mirror Chat and character editing features are disabled until you resubscribe.

s8.title: 8. Privacy
s8.p1: Your use of the Service is also governed by our

s8_2.p2: , which describes how we collect, use, and protect your information.

s9.title: 9. Disclaimers
s9.p1: THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED “AS IS” AND “AS AVAILABLE” WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED. We do not warrant that the Service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or secure.
s9.strong1: The Service is not a mental health service.
s9.p2: AI-generated responses do not constitute therapy, medical advice, or professional counseling. If you are in crisis, please contact emergency services or the

s10.title: 10. Limitation of Liability
s10.p1: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Golden Black LLC shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of profits or revenues, whether incurred directly or indirectly, arising from your use of the Service.

s11.title: 11. Termination
s11.p1: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at any time for violation of these Terms, the Acceptable Use Policy, or for any other reason at our sole discretion. Upon termination, your right to use the Service ceases immediately.

s12.title: 12. Changes to Terms
s12.p1: We may update these Terms from time to time. If we make material changes, we will notify you through the Service or by other means. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

s13.title: 13. Governing Law
s13.p1: These Terms shall be governed by the laws of the Commonwealth of Massachusetts, without regard to conflict of law provisions.

s14.title: 14. Contact
s14.p1: For questions about these Terms, contact us at

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Privacy Policy for the Earnest Page platform.

s1.title: 1. Introduction
s1.p1: Golden Black LLC (“we,” “us,” or “our”) operates Earnest Page. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information when you use our platform. We are committed to transparency and to protecting your privacy.

s2.title: 2. Information We Collect
s2.p1: We use phone-based authentication via Twilio Verify. Your phone number is used solely to send a one-time verification code during login.
s2.strong1: We do not store your phone number in our database.
s2.p2: A one-way cryptographic hash (SHA-256) of your phone number is stored for the Contact Firewall feature, which allows you to exclude people you know from your anonymous feed.
s2.p3: Information you voluntarily provide during onboarding and profile editing: gender, age, ethnicity (optional), life vision, important people in your life, and personal interests. This data is used exclusively to build your Character Bible and personalize your AI interactions.
s2.p4: Your conversations with Mirror Chat are temporarily stored in Firebase Firestore during the active session. After a session closes, the conversation is processed to update your dossier and (if you have chosen public routing) generate an anonymous post. The raw conversation transcript is stored as
s2.strong2: never visible to any user other than you
s2.p6: . “Burn on Close” sessions are deleted immediately with zero data retention.
s2.p7: If you grant browser geolocation permission, your approximate coordinates (latitude and longitude) are used for the Proximity Blind Spot feature, which filters posts from within a 200-mile radius to protect your anonymity. You may also manually set a location anchor via zip code. Your precise coordinates are never displayed to other users or included in API responses.
s2.p8: Payment processing is handled entirely by Stripe. We do not store credit card numbers, bank account details, or other payment credentials on our servers. We store only your subscription status, plan type, and Stripe payment intent identifiers.

s3.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
s3.l1: To authenticate your identity and manage your account
s3.l2: To power the AI-driven Mirror Chat, dossier updates, and character compilation
s3.l3: To generate anonymous, AI-ghostwritten posts for the public feed (with your consent via routing settings)
s3.l4: To generate AI-powered hero images for posts
s3.l6: To process payments and manage subscriptions
s3.l7: To improve the Service and fix technical issues

s4.title: 4. Third-Party Services
s4.p1: We use the following third-party services to operate the platform:

s5.title: 5. Anonymity & Public Content
s5.p1: When a conversation is published to the Dear Earnest feed, it is processed by AI to create a fully anonymized, ghostwritten version. All personally identifiable information — including names, locations, employers, and specific details — is scrubbed and replaced with pseudonyms before publication.
s5.strong1: never accessible to any user other than the author
s5.p3: . We do not display like counts, follower counts, or engagement metrics to other users.

s6.title: 6. Data Retention
s6.l1: Active chat sessions are deleted within 15 minutes of closing.
s6.l2: “Burn on Close” sessions are purged immediately with no data retained.
s6.l3: Published posts are retained until you delete them or delete your account.
s6.l4: Your dossier and character profile are retained for the duration of your account.
s6.l5: Payment records are retained for 7 years as required for tax and accounting compliance.
s6.l6: Upon account deletion, all personal data is permanently erased within 30 days, except where retention is required by law.

s7.title: 7. Lawful Basis for Processing (GDPR)
s7.p1: If you are located in the European Economic Area (EEA), the United Kingdom, or Switzerland, we process your personal data under the following lawful bases as defined by the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR):
s7.b1: Processing your account data, managing subscriptions, delivering the Mirror Chat service, and generating your Character Bible — these are necessary to provide the service you signed up for.
s7.b2: Publishing anonymous posts to the public feed (you control this via your routing settings), collecting location data for the Proximity Blind Spot feature (you can deny GPS access), and processing your conversations via third-party AI models.
s7.b3: Maintaining platform security, preventing fraud and abuse, improving the service, and generating aggregate analytics. We balance our interests against your rights and do not use your data for profiling, advertising, or sale to third parties.
s7.b4: Retaining financial records as required by tax law, and responding to valid legal process.
s7.p2: You may withdraw consent at any time by adjusting your routing settings to Private, denying browser geolocation, or contacting us. Withdrawing consent does not affect the lawfulness of processing performed before the withdrawal.

s8.title: 8. International Data Transfers
s8.p1: Golden Black LLC is based in the United States. If you access Earnest Page from outside the United States, your personal data will be transferred to and processed in the United States, where data protection laws may differ from those in your jurisdiction.
s8.p2: For users in the EEA, UK, and Switzerland, we rely on the following safeguards for international data transfers:
s8.l1: Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) approved by the European Commission, incorporated into our agreements with sub-processors where applicable.
s8.l2: Our third-party service providers (Firebase/Google, Stripe, Anthropic, Twilio, Vercel) maintain their own data processing agreements and transfer mechanisms compliant with applicable regulations.
s8.l3: We implement supplementary technical measures including encryption in transit (TLS 1.2+), encryption at rest, and access controls to protect transferred data.
s8.p3: By using the Service, you acknowledge and consent to the transfer and processing of your data in the United States. You may request a copy of the safeguards we use by contacting us.

s9.title: 9. Your Rights
s9.p1: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the following rights regarding your personal data:
s9.l1: the personal data we hold about you
s9.l2: your account and all associated data (via Security & Routing in-app or by contacting us)
s9.l3: your data in a portable, machine-readable format (via the data export feature in-app)
s9.l4: of public publishing by setting your default routing to Private
s9.l5: location data collection by denying browser geolocation
s9.t2: Additional Rights for EEA, UK, and Swiss Users (GDPR)
s9.l6: — request correction of inaccurate or incomplete personal data
s9.l7: — request that we limit the processing of your data in certain circumstances
s9.l8: — object to processing based on legitimate interests
s9.l9: — where processing is based on consent, withdraw it at any time
s9.l10: — with your local Data Protection Authority if you believe your rights have been violated
s9.l11: Right to know what personal information we collect, use, and disclose
s9.l12: Right to delete your personal information
s9.l13: Right to opt out of the sale of personal information — we do not sell personal information
s9.l14: Right to non-discrimination for exercising your privacy rights
s9.p2: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at
s9.p3: We will respond to all rights requests within 30 days (GDPR) or 45 days (CCPA).

s10.title: 10. Children's Privacy
s10.p1: The Service is available to users aged 13 and older (or 16 in jurisdictions where GDPR requires it). We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under the applicable minimum age. If we learn that we have collected data from a child below the applicable age, we will promptly delete that information.

s11.title: 11. Security
s11.p1: We employ industry-standard security measures including encrypted data transmission (TLS), cryptographic hashing (SHA-256) for sensitive identifiers, Firebase security rules, and Stripe's PCI-compliant payment infrastructure. However, no method of electronic storage or transmission is 100% secure.

s12.title: 12. Changes to This Policy
s12.p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. If we make material changes, we will provide notice through the Service. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

s13.title: 13. Data Protection Contact
s13.p1: For privacy-related questions, data protection inquiries, or to exercise your rights under GDPR, CCPA, or other applicable privacy laws, contact:

s14.title: 14. Contact
s14.p1: For general privacy questions, contact us at

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable Use Policy
acceptableUse.subtitle: Acceptable Use Policy for the Earnest Page platform.
acceptableUse.intro: This Acceptable Use Policy (“AUP”) governs your use of Earnest Page. By using the Service, you agree to comply with this policy. Violation may result in suspension or termination of your account.

s1.title: 1. Prohibited Content
s1.p1: You may not use the Service to create, transmit, or store content that:
s1.l2: Promotes or incites violence against any person or group
s1.l3: Contains sexually explicit material involving minors
s1.l4: Constitutes harassment, bullying, or targeted abuse
s1.l5: Contains discriminatory content based on race, ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, religion, disability, or national origin
s1.l6: Glorifies or promotes self-harm or suicide
s1.l7: Contains malware, phishing attempts, or other malicious code

s2.title: 2. Prohibited Conduct
s2.l1: Share or expose another person's private information
s2.l2: Use the platform to plan, coordinate, or carry out harm against any person
s2.l3: Attempt to circumvent the Contact Firewall, Proximity Blind Spot, or other privacy features
s2.l4: Attempt to de-anonymize other users or identify post authors
s2.l5: Use automated scripts, bots, or scrapers to access the Service
s2.l6: Attempt to reverse-engineer, exploit, or compromise the AI models or platform infrastructure
s2.l7: Create multiple accounts to circumvent bans or restrictions

s3.title: 3. Safety & Crisis
s3.p1: Earnest Page is a self-actualization tool, not a mental health service. If the AI detects language indicating suicidal ideation, self-harm, or intent to harm others, it will pause the conversation and provide crisis resources.
s3.strong: If you or someone you know is in immediate danger, call 911 or your local emergency services. For mental health crises, contact the 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline (call or text 988).

s4.title: 4. Content Moderation
s4.p1: AI-generated posts are reviewed by automated content filters before publication to the public feed. Posts that violate this policy may be withheld from the feed, flagged for review, or removed. We reserve the right to take action against accounts that repeatedly produce flagged content.

s5.title: 5. Reporting
s5.p1: If you encounter content or behavior that violates this policy, please report it to

s5_2.p2: . We will review reports promptly and take appropriate action.

s6.title: 6. Enforcement
s6.p1: Violations of this policy may result in: content removal, temporary suspension, permanent account termination, or reporting to law enforcement when legally required (e.g., credible threats of violence or child exploitation).

legalDisclaimer: This legal document is translated for your convenience. In case of any discrepancies, the English version prevails.
